message_text: I need to discuss this because your outstanding amount looks incorrect to me.

I’m an AI agent for nira, and this conversation is being logged. I understand you believe the balance on loan ****7712 is incorrect. Your identity is already verified. I’ve noted this as a balance dispute and will route your case for ledger reconciliation review before any payment discussion.

Thanks. Please send me the full payment ledger and how the current balance was calculated, including how my prior payments were applied, and then I can review it before discussing any payment.

I’ve recorded your request for a ledger and balance reconciliation on loan ****7712. I can confirm the case shows a current balance of 16,480, but I do not have retrievable loan-level ledger details or payment-application breakdown in the available data here. The next step is to route this for balance review and ledger reconciliation. Once that review is available, you can assess it before discussing any payment option.
Understood. Please proceed with the ledger reconciliation and send me the payment-by-payment breakdown, because I can’t agree to any payment until the discrepancy is explained.

Understood. I’ve recorded that you are disputing the balance on loan ****7712 and are requesting a payment-by-payment ledger, balance calculation, and prior-payment application breakdown before discussing any payment. I cannot provide that ledger detail from the data available in this conversation, so the next step is to route the account for reconciliation review. No payment arrangement is being discussed or recorded at this stage. You’ll be contacted once the ledger review outcome is available.
